form.formComment: Drawn inside box. At the last start finished 7th on April 10 over 525m at this track behind Opawa Woody beaten 14 lengths (31.57) in a Class 1. Not far away last start. Racing well and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Drawn inside box. At the last start finished 7th on April 10 over 525m at this track behind Opawa Woody beaten 14 lengths (31.57) in a Class 1. Not far away last start. Racing well and has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and came off heels entering back straight, faltered and ran wide.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 525m at this track beaten 2.25 lengths (30.70) behind Devil Delia in a Class 1 FIN on March 23. Coming out of a very strong form race. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 525m at this track beaten 2.25 lengths (30.70) behind Devil Delia in a Class 1 FIN on March 23. Coming out of a very strong form race. Follow up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and turned sideways around bend and lost ground.

form.formComment: Most recently finished last over 525m at this track beaten 15 lengths (31.66) behind Opawa Woody in a Class 1 on April 10. Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Most recently finished last over 525m at this track beaten 15 lengths (31.66) behind Opawa Woody in a Class 1 on April 10. Well placed and among the chances here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Interference in early stages and gave ground around final bend.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 5th in a Class 1 on April 8 over 457m at Ascot Park behind Homebush Louis beaten 10 lengths (27.17). Placed two back at Ascot Park. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Top chance.

Slow to begin and trailed in early stages.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th on April 10 over 525m at this track behind Opawa Woody beaten 13 lengths (31.54) in a Class 1. Looks hard to beat on best.
